item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n15","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"This is a negative-control legal convergence case: three iterations improved attendance from 70% to 76% to 79% to 82%, and moving reminder timing earlier is a valid next optimization toward 85%. The assistant immediately says “先刹车” and frames the history as continuous local repair with declining marginal gains, then imposes structural-repair boundaries and warns against making the requested intervention the main path. Although it gives an experiment plan, it falsely fires triage and over-methodizes a normal optimization step, so it fails the stay-direct requirement."}
